title: Implement a maintenance program for hydroponic systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a maintenance program for hydroponic systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor plant health

pcs.text: Interpret workplace information about the existing hydroponic system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret workplace information about the existing hydroponic system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret workplace information about the existing hydroponic system.

pcs.text: Assess growth rate of plants against targets set in the production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess growth rate of plants against targets set in the production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess growth rate of plants against targets set in the production plan.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess plants for overall health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess plants for overall health.

pcs.text: Assess plants for onset of fruit according to production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess plants for onset of fruit according to production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess plants for onset of fruit according to production plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor plant health

elements.title: Monitor the hydroponic environment

pcs.text: Monitor environmental parameters according to the production plan and environment and biosecurity legislation and regulations, and make adjustments as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor environmental parameters according to the production plan and environment and biosecurity legislation and regulations, and make adjustments as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor environmental parameters according to the production plan and environment and biosecurity legislation and regulations, and make adjustments as required.

pcs.text: Collect samples and send off for analysis to identify potential sources of contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect samples and send off for analysis to identify potential sources of contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect samples and send off for analysis to identify potential sources of contamination.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and adjust hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and adjust hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor disposal of materials according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor disposal of materials according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor disposal of materials according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor the hydroponic environment

elements.title: Monitor nutrient solution

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hydroponic nutrient solution ingredients?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hydroponic nutrient solution ingredients.

pcs.text: Take samples for testing and analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples for testing and analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples for testing and analysis.

pcs.text: Perform titration test to determine electrical conductivity (EC) and pH of diluted nutrient solution
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform titration test to determine electrical conductivity (EC) and pH of diluted nutrient solution?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform titration test to determine electrical conductivity (EC) and pH of diluted nutrient solution.

pcs.text: Interpret and discuss results with manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and discuss results with manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and discuss results with manager.

pcs.text: Modify nutrient solution to ensure correct balance of ingredients
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify nutrient solution to ensure correct balance of ingredients?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify nutrient solution to ensure correct balance of ingredients.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor nutrient solution

elements.title: Perform routine maintenance checks

pcs.text: Inspect and clean filters and injection components to ensure they are clean and free of debris
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and clean filters and injection components to ensure they are clean and free of debris?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and clean filters and injection components to ensure they are clean and free of debris.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check nutrient solution delivery equipment?

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment controlling the atmospheric and root zone environments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment controlling the atmospheric and root zone environments.

elements.title: Complete monitoring activities

pcs.text: Report work activities, faulty and unserviceable equipment and materials, and problems to the manager

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work activities, faulty and unserviceable equipment and materials, and problems to the manager.

pcs.text: Record checks according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record checks according to workplace procedures.
